# Diners Club Rewardz Credit Card
Sourcing of this Credit Card has been stopped. Existing customers of this card will continue to enjoy the benefits.
![Diners Club Rewardz Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/diners-club-rewardz-credit-card-desktop-banner?fmt=webp-alpha)
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/generic-mailer-tnc.pdf) to view the changes in HDFC Bank All Diners Club Rewardz Cardeffective 15th May 2026.

## Card Benefits and Features
### Reward Point Benefits
  * 1,000 Reward Points on card activation and renewal.
  * 3 Reward Points for every ₹200 spent.


![Diners Club Rewards Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Low markup on foreign currency transactions of just 3%.
  * Earn up to 5% CashBack for spends via [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/foryou)


![Diners Club Rewards Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
Lifestyle Benefits
  * 24 x 7 Global Personal Concierge Service for travel needs. through our toll-free number: 1800 209 4006
  * Redeem Reward points for booking Air Tickets / Hotels across 150+ Airlines and Choice of hotels (Domestic & International) at [www.hdfcbankdinersclub.com(opens in a new tab)](http://www.hdfcbankdinersclub.com/) (1 Reward Point = 0.30 AirMile)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/diners-club-rewardz-credit-card "View More")
![Diners Club Rewards Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know More About The Card
  1. ### MyCards
  2. ### Reward Redemption
  3. ### Fees and Renewal
  4. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions


#  MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/)**,** a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Regalia Gold Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up your Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, Manage, Set PIN and Card Controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management and Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Reward Redemption 
  * You can redeem your Reward Points on [SmartBuy(opens in a new tab)](https://offers.smartbuy.hdfcbank.com/v1/diners) or NetBanking.
  * Reward Points can be redeemed across various categories as follows:

  
| 1 Reward point Equivalent to  |  
| --- |  
| SmartBuy (Flight and hotel bookings)  | ₹0.30  |  
| AirMiles conversion*  | 0.30 AirMile  |  
| Products Catalogue and vouchers  | up to ₹0.25  |  
| CashBack  | up to ₹0.15  |  
*AirMile Partners: ​​Jet Airways (JPMiles) or Singapore Airlines (KrisFlyer Miles).  

  * Redeem Reward Points for up to 70% of flight and hotel bookings.
  * Reward Points earned are capped at 15,000 in a statement cycle.


![Card Control and Redemption](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Fees and Renewal 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee: ₹1,000 plus Applicable Taxes


  * On annual spends of ₹1 Lakh, get ₹1,000 renewal fee waived off on your Diners Club Rewardz Credit Card


![Fees and Renewal](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

  * The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/diners-club-rewardz-credit-card/pdfs/terms-and-conditions.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
###  What is a Diners Club Rewardz Card?
The **Diners Club Rewardz Credit Card** is a Credit Card that offers unmatched rewards, exclusive benefits, and convenient redemption options.
###  What is the credit limit of the Diners Club Rewardz Card?
The credit limit on your **Diners Club Rewardz Credit Card** depends on various factors such as your income, credit history, and other eligibility criteria. Once your application is approved, you will be notified of your assigned credit limit.
###  Does the Diners Club Rewardz Card have lounge access?
The Diners Club Rewardz Card provides unlimited airport lounge access to ​​1,000 plus lounges in India for both primary and add-on card members*.
###  What are the benefits of the Diners Club Rewardz Credit Card? 
The Diners Club Rewardz Credit Card from HDFC offers exclusive rewards, accelerated Reward Points, dining privileges, travel benefits, and fuel surcharge waivers, providing a comprehensive range of perks for cardholders.
###  How to apply for a Diners Club Rewardz Credit Card?
We are currently not accepting new applications for the HDFC Bank Diners Club Rewardz Credit Card. However, you can explore a range of other credit cards that may suit your needs. Click [here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards) to view our available options and find the right card for you.
